title: Victoria, BC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Victoria, BC: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Victoria is a city in BC with a population of 367,770. Canada’s mildest city with beautiful gardens, a relaxed island lifestyle, and a popular retirement destination — but housing is costly.

Last updated: June 30, 2026
